changeSet.author: Mariia
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.agent_decisions (event_id, step_number, page_url, page_state_summary, llm_raw_response, llm_thought, action_taken, llm_model, response_time_ms, parse_success, retry_count, decided_at) VALUES (1, 2, N'https://example.com/step1', N'Visible nav and 4 product cards.', N'{"action":"click","target":"#item-1"}', N'User should compare prices before adding to rollback.sql: DELETE FROM dbo.agent_decisions WHERE event_id IN (SELECT id FROM dbo.events WHERE session_id IN (SELECT id FROM dbo.sessions WHERE created_at = '2026-03-01 06:00:00'));
